title: Unearthing New Giants and Ancient Practices: A Dive into Historical Discoveries
description: In a stunning discovery Brazilian scientists have unearthed evidence of a new giant dinosaur species Dasosaurus tocantinensis This colossal creature linked to a similar species found in Spain has deepened understanding of ancient land connections across South America Africa and Europe

title: Qurh: Ancient trade city near AlUla reveals early Islamic heritage
description: article author: Arab NewsSat, 2026-03-14 02:07ALULA: The ruins of the ancient city of Qurh, located about 20 kilometers south of AlUla in the Madinah Province of northwestern Saudi Arabia, offer a glimpse into a once-thriving center of trade and culture in the historic valley of Wadi Al-Qura, according to a report by the Saudi Press Agency.Main category: Saudi ArabiaTags: AlUlaMadinah

title: Discrepancies in ancient texts
description: Critics often ask, “Why was there not more written between the resurrection and the writing of the letters of Paul starting in 48-50 A.D.?”

title: Saving ancient knowledge: Steve Thomas chronicles life on a remote south Pacific island
description: Steve Thomas releases an updated edition of "The Last Navigator," preserving Satawal's cultural legacy of its islanders and ocean navigation.
